title: alphitonia zizyphoides
intro: Alphitonia zizyphoides, also known as the Wheel Timber or Zizyphus, is a species of tree native to Australia and New Guinea. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. Alphitonia zizyphoides has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for herbal remedies, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
